Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 81 

LINE_NUM_ORIG 

LABEL: Original Claim Line Number 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies an individual line number on an encounter record claim, as assigned in the CMS 
Integrated Data Repository (IDR). 

SHORT NAME: LINE_NUM_ORIG 

LONG NAME: LINE_NUM_ORIG 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 13 

SOURCE: CCW 

FILE(S): IP revenue 

SNF revenue 

HH revenue 

OP revenue 

Carrier Line 

DME
